frame_analyses.description: Initial grasping of gauze close to cutting line with the left instrument.
Scissors begin cutting at 5 o'clock position, proceeding clockwise.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good control, following marked line closely.

frame_analyses.description: Continued cutting towards the 10 o'clock position following the marked line.
Resuming cut from 10 o'clock back to 6 o'clock in counterclockwise direction.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining closer adherence to the line.

frame_analyses.description: Final cut completed, circle is free from the gauze.

penalties.description: Slight deviation seen at frame 11, approximately 3mm from the marked line.

confidence_rationale: The video's angle and quality provide clear evidence of instrument placement and cutting path, except in slight deviations difficult to measure precisely.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation during the entirety of the cut due to angle changes.
technique_summary: The performance displayed efficient cutting technique with minimal overshoot. Precise control was maintained, except for slight deviation midway.
strengths: Smooth transition across different phases of the task.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining cutting within 2mm of the marked line to avoid deviations.
Practice consistent pressure to ensure uniform cuts.
